creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 172565
Shar archive

Someone actually submitted my unfinished port from https://github.com/outpaddling/freebsd-ports-wip, with me listed as the maintainer.  I was not asked or informed about this.  Fortunately, I did a PR search before submitting a duplicate.

The new shar attached should supersede the original.

portlint: OK (looks fine.)
testport: OK (poudriere: 9.3, 10.1 / amd64, i386
